com.gpudb.protocol.InsertSymbolRequest

  • Uses of InsertSymbolRequest in com.gpudb

    Methods in com.gpudb with parameters of type InsertSymbolRequest
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    InsertSymbolResponse
    GPUdb.insertSymbol(InsertSymbolRequest request)
    Adds a symbol or icon (i.e. an image) to represent data points when data is rendered visually.
